TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jerry_Bird, title = Jerry_Bird, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jerry_Bird} }

S.FORM: Jerry Bird sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1934, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 2, Jerry Bird, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2017) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jerry Bird sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1934, ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 2, Jerry Bird, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2017) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *errj βir* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *errj βir*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
